creator: chinsan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, Nick:

poke..

On Tue, Sep 2, 2008 at 11:20 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> The following reply was made to PR ports/127046; it has been noted by
> GNATS.
>
> From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> To: nick@foobar.org
> Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Subject: Re: ports/127046: repocopy www/tinymce -> www/tinymce3
> Date: Tue, 2 Sep 2008 15:10:14 UT
>
>  Maintainer of www/tinymce,
>
>  Please note that PR ports/127046 has just been submitted.
>
>  If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  and a committer will take care of it.
>
>  The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/127046
>
>  --
>  Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  edwin@FreeBSD.org
